sections.paragraph:
εἵνεκεν prep. w. gen. (Pind.+; IAsMinLyk 109; Sb 1568, 7; PGiss 40 II, 21; PGM 5, 385; LXX) on account of Lk 4:18 (Is 61:1); Ac 28:20 v.l.; 2 Cor 3:10; s. ἕνεκα.

prep. prep. = preposition(al)

gen. gen. = genitive

Pind Pind , V b.c.—List 5

IAsMinLyk IAsMinLyk = inscriptions from Asia Minor: Lycia etc.—List 3

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

PGiss PGiss = Griechische Papyri . . . zu Giessen—List 4

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 286
